incidents.Comments: Management reported that a customer made verbal threats towards an associate due to being stopped for a transaction issue. Law enforcement was notified and escorted the customer off property. No injuries were reported and no impact to business operations. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.
Management reported that an associate was physically assaulted by two known individuals due to personal matters near infants. Law enforcement responded, and no injuries were reported.

Management reported that an associate was yelling that they were going to have a breakdown, and began throwing merchandise to the ground. Management was given Lyra resources. Law enforcement was not notified, and no injuries or impacts to business operations were reported. Call Lyra at 800-825-3555 or email care@lyrahealth.com. Learn more at walmart.lyrahealth.com Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported that an associate was terminated for gross misconduct and caused a disturbance by refusing to leave and making verbal threats toward the facility. Law enforcement was notified, but the individual left the property before their arrival. No impact to business operations.

Management reported approximately ten minors physically assaulted an associate when asked to stop playing with a mart cart. The minors fled from the property. Law enforcement and EMS responded. EMS is checking on the associate at this time. The associate is in stable condition. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

incidents.Address: 1126 E LYNCHBURG SALEM TPKE, BEDFORD, VA

Update (12/17/25 5:46 AM CST): The individuals did flee with multiple batteries. Management reported two masked individuals broke the lock on the exterior battery cage but were interrupted by security. The individuals fled without any merchandise. Law enforcement assistance was not needed.

incidents.Address: 4807 VALLEY VIEW BLVD NW, ROANOKE, VA
incidents.Comments: Management reported that two customer engaged in a physical altercation at the front-end due to a personal matter. Law enforcement was notified, however both parties left the facility prior to law enforcement arrival. No injuries were reported, and no impacts to store operations were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form:

Management reported that an associate was terminated for gross misconduct and afterward expressed thoughts of self-harm due to personal reasons. LYRA resources were not provided, and management will conduct a store-level investigation before notifying law enforcement. Thank you for calling the EOC to report an incident. If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management’s request form.
Management reported an individual forced entry into a secured battery cage and left the facility with unpaid merchandise. Law enforcement was notified. No impact to store operations.
Management reported they had two individuals physically assault one another due to unknown reasons. No injuries were reported. Law enforcement was notified. Store operations were not impacted.

Management reported an associate made a threat of violence towards a tenant associate due to potential intoxication. No injuries were reported. Law enforcement was not notified. Store operations were not impacted. Thank you for calling the EOC to report an incident. If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the below link to be directed to Threat Management’s request form.

Management reported that a third-party driver made a threat of violence towards an associate due to the back door receiving doorbell not working. Law enforcement was not notified; however, management also made a report to the Distribution Center. Thank you for calling the EOC to report an incident. If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management’s request form.

Management reported that an individual made a threat of physical harm toward an AP associate, claiming they were being watched. The individual left, then returned briefly to shoplift shoes, and left again without further incident. Law enforcement was notified. Threat Management on-call was engaged for further assistance. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported a customer physically assaulted an associate due to unknown reasons. No injuries were reported. Law enforcement was notified, however, the customer fled. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

incidents.Address: 6721 CHESAPEAKE CENTER DR, GLEN BURNIE, MD
incidents.Comments: Management reported two customers had a physical altercation in the parking lot, due to unknown reasons. Law enforcement responded and made contact with both customers, but no actions were taken. No injuries were reported.

Management reported that a customer shoved an associate due to being asked for a receipt check. Law enforcement was not notified, no injuries were reported, and no impact to business operations. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported a customer made a threat towards an associate when approached for skip-scanning. Law enforcement was not notified. Notice: If the incident involved a threat or physical assault with or without a weapon, please be sure to follow the link below to create an event in the Auror app. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.

Management reported an individual allegedly entered the facility with a firearm, prompting an evacuation. Law enforcement has placed one individual into custody, but no firearm has been recovered. Law enforcement is currently investigating, and management will update with more information.

Management reported that two associates and their guardians made threats of physical violence towards another associate due to personal reasons. Law enforcement has been notified, and no impacts or injuries were reported. Notice: If you need assistance from Threat Management, please use the link below to be directed to Threat Management's request form.
